About Hydroxy M&S

With over 15 years of expertise, we specialize in premium waterproofing and epoxy flooring solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial spaces.

Premium Quality

Only the finest materials and proven techniques for lasting results.

Expert Team

Certified professionals with extensive industry experience.

Guaranteed Results

Full warranty coverage and satisfaction guarantee.

Our Collaboration Process

How we work together to deliver exceptional results

01

Consultation

Initial meeting to understand your needs and vision
02

Design

Creating detailed plans and material selection
03

Installation

Expert execution with premium materials
04

Quality Assurance

Final inspection and client satisfaction

Client Testimonials

What our satisfied clients say about our work

SM

Sarah Mitchell

Residential Client

"Absolutely stunning result! The epoxy flooring transformed our entire home. Professional service from start to finish."

JD

John Davis

Commercial Client

"Our office floors look incredible after Hydroxy's work. The team was professional, efficient, and the quality exceeded our expectations."

AK

Anna Kowalski

Residential Client

"Hydroxy M&S transformed our bathroom with their waterproofing solutions. The attention to detail and quality of work was exceptional."

MJ

Michael Johnson

Industrial Client

"The industrial epoxy flooring installed by Hydroxy M&S has completely transformed our warehouse. Durable, easy to clean, and looks fantastic even after heavy use."

LN

Laura Nowak

Residential Client

"We had our basement waterproofed by Hydroxy M&S and couldn't be happier with the results. No more moisture issues, and the team was incredibly professional and clean."

RB

Robert Brown

Commercial Client

"Our retail store needed a durable yet stylish flooring solution. Hydroxy M&S delivered a stunning metallic epoxy floor that our customers constantly compliment."

KW

Katarzyna Wiśniewska

Residential Client

"The garage floor coating from Hydroxy M&S is simply perfect. It's been two years and it still looks brand new despite heavy use and winter conditions."

TM

Tomasz Majewski

Industrial Client

"We needed a specialized chemical-resistant flooring for our production facility. Hydroxy M&S provided expert advice and a perfect solution that has withstood all challenges."

EG

Emma Garcia

Commercial Client

"Our hotel lobby needed a luxurious yet durable floor. The decorative epoxy system installed by Hydroxy M&S has been perfect - beautiful, easy to maintain, and incredibly durable."

PZ

Piotr Zieliński

Residential Client

"The waterproofing system Hydroxy M&S installed in our shower has been flawless. No leaks, no mold, and the decorative finish looks as good as the day it was installed."
